summary_en: 47,600 shares acquired for ¥274.9M (¥5,781/share) from 1–13 May 2026 via open market. Cumulative program execution: 219,300 shares for ¥999.7M of authorized ¥1.0B limit (380,000 shares, 2.91% S/O) over March 2026–February 2027 window. Program concluded.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Treasury Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief:
GL Techno Holdings announced completion of a treasury share acquisition programme on 14 May 2026. The company acquired 47,600 shares at a total cost of ¥274.9 million (approximately ¥5,781 per share) via open market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 1 and 13 May 2026. This acquisition marks the conclusion of the board-authorized buyback resolved on 27 February 2026.

The programme was authorized to acquire up to 380,000 shares (2.91% of outstanding shares) for a maximum aggregate price of ¥1.0 billion over the period from 17 March 2026 to 26 February 2027. As of the completion date of 13 May 2026, the company had cumulatively acquired 219,300 shares for ¥999.67 million, consuming 99.97% of the authorized budget and 57.7% of the authorized share count. The programme has been terminated following this final tranche.
